text: This place invites curiosity and introspection. The cool, clinical architecture outside contrasts with the glowing purple of the interior room, drawing me onward. Inside, the wall of 'R+D' and its vibrant, technological design excite my mind. I feel on the edge of discovery, surrounded by symbols of progress, intelligence, and creative potential. There is a sense of purposeful energy here—innovation is celebrated, uncertainty is embraced. I feel hopeful and alert, eager to understand and contribute.
